about.title: What is Limpora?
about.description: Learn about the platform, how it works, and how to contact us.

what.title: The platform
what.body: Limpora is a digital platform that connects individuals and businesses with professional cleaners. You can hire independent freelancers registered on the platform or Limpora's own staff — all accessible from one place.

who.title: Who is it for?
who.body: Anyone who needs professional cleaning services: homes, vehicles, swimming pools, facades, or high-value items. Also for freelance cleaners looking to reach clients easily.

disclaimer.title: Professional verification
disclaimer.body: Limpora currently verifies professionals via email confirmation or Google sign-in (OAuth). We do not perform documentary identity verification at this time. We recommend reviewing profiles and ratings before booking.

aviso.responsable_body: Limpora is a digital platform operated in Spain. For any legal inquiry please contact soporte@limpora.es.
aviso.actividad_body: Limpora acts as an intermediary platform between users who request cleaning services and professionals (registered freelancers or Limpora's own staff) who provide them.
aviso.intermediario_body: Limpora is not a party to the service contract between the client and the self-employed professional. In the case of Limpora's own staff, responsibility lies directly with the platform.

privacidad.responsable_body: Limpora processes personal data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD). Contact: soporte@limpora.es.
privacidad.datos_body: Full name, email address, encrypted password (for email registration), and Google session data (for OAuth sign-in). Payment data is not collected directly — processing is delegated to Stripe.
privacidad.finalidad_body: Account management, provision of the intermediary service, service-related communications, and compliance with legal obligations.
privacidad.base_body: Contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) for service provision. Legitimate interest for operational communications. Legal obligation where applicable.
privacidad.conservacion_body: Data is retained while the account is active. After deletion, data is kept for the legally required period and then permanently removed.
privacidad.derechos_body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection by writing to
privacidad.menores_body: Limpora is not intended for users under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacidad.verificacion_body: Professional identity verification is currently limited to email confirmation or Google OAuth sign-in. No documentary verification is performed. Limpora is working to implement additional verification levels in the future.

cookies.intro: Limpora uses first-party and third-party cookies necessary for the platform to function.
cookies.types_body: Session cookies to maintain login state. Third-party ImageKit cookies for image management. Email tracking cookies for transactional notifications. No advertising cookies are used.
cookies.control_body: You can manage or delete cookies from your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may prevent the platform from functioning correctly. From Settings > Manage cookies you can reset cookie preferences within the app.

terminos.uso_body: Accessing and using Limpora implies acceptance of these terms. The platform is intended for users over 18 years of age residing in Spain.
terminos.reservas_body: Bookings made through Limpora constitute an agreement between the client and the professional, or between the client and Limpora (when the professional is a Limpora employee). Limpora facilitates the process but does not guarantee professional availability.
terminos.comision_body: Limpora applies a 20% commission on the amount of each service paid through the platform. This amount is automatically deducted from the professional's payment.
terminos.responsabilidad_body: Limpora is not liable for damages arising from the actions of self-employed professionals registered on the platform. The platform acts as an intermediary and does not supervise service execution on site.
terminos.ley_body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of the user's place of residence, unless applicable regulations establish a different jurisdiction.
